judge.reason: The primary purpose of audit_log_task_info is to log a comprehensive set of task-related information (PID, UIDs, GIDs, TTY, command, executable path, security context) into an audit buffer. The get/put calls on tty (audit_get_tty / audit_put_tty) are merely a small part of extracting the TTY name, not the central purpose. The function performs extensive formatting and logging, making it a business-logic function rather than a reference-count wrapper.
